title: 日本ダービーの後に・2つ目の冠

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon has won first! That's right,
Mihono Bourbon has taken first place!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I knew Mihono Bourbon had it in her! She's the
next to get a Double Crown after Tokai Teio!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
But she's got the Kikuka Sho next, you know. It'd
be great if she could pull off 3,000 meters, but...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Oh, shut it! Our Bourbon's definitely gonna take that one, too!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, your orders have been successfully
executed!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. This is all thanks to your
guidance.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I await your next ord—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Based on your lack of focus and unstable footing,
I have confirmed that you are completely
exhausted. Are you... "okay"?

Rice Shower mumbles her answer in a daze,
making me wonder if she really heard what
Mihono Bourbon said.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I still... couldn't catch up...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You're so... amazing... I have to keep... working...
harder...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I have to... work... even harder... I have to...
change...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz...

We bring Rice Shower somewhere safe and make
sure she's awake before we leave the Tokyo
Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer. I cannot understand Rice.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Why is she so fixated upon me? Why does she
wish to "catch up" to me?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In a race, the result is either "victory" or "defeat."
Rice, however, doesn't focus on either of those
outcomes.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
She only expresses a desire to "catch up." That is
the reason she runs.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My database does not have any information that
can explain the logic behind her actions.

Every runner puts their own feelings into races.
There are some who don't place much importance
on winning.

You can only truly understand an emotion after
you've experienced it for yourself.

Mihono Bourbon's grasp on emotions is tenuous
at best, so Rice Shower's feelings are likely even
harder for her to comprehend.
choice_data_list:
I'm sure you'll be able to understand everything
one day.

text_block_list.text:
I'm certain we'll continue to face off against Rice
Shower in the Twinkle Series.

I tell Mihono Bourbon there's no rush. She'll
understand someday, so she just needs to wait.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The basis of your statement is unclear, but if that
is your opinion, then I determine it is worth
putting into practice.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I will wait for the day that I understand.
The train quietly moves toward the academy.

Next up is the final race in the Classic Triple
Crown—the Kikuka Sho!
